creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Build of devel/py-distributed-2021.7.2 (branch 2021Q4) fails in pkg-depends because py38-cloudpickle>=1.5.0 is requested but only version 1.3.0 is provided in ports.

=======================<phase: run-depends    >============================
===>   py38-distributed-2021.7.2 depends on package: py38-click>=6.6 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/py38-click-7.1.2.pkg
[13Rarmv7-quarterly-job-04] Installing py38-click-7.1.2...
[13Rarmv7-quarterly-job-04] Extracting py38-click-7.1.2: .......... done
===>   py38-distributed-2021.7.2 depends on package: py38-click>=6.6 - found
===>   Returning to build of py38-distributed-2021.7.2
===>   py38-distributed-2021.7.2 depends on package: py38-cloudpickle>=1.5.0 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/py38-cloudpickle-1.3.0.pkg
[13Rarmv7-quarterly-job-04] Installing py38-cloudpickle-1.3.0...
[13Rarmv7-quarterly-job-04] Extracting py38-cloudpickle-1.3.0: .......... done
===>   py38-distributed-2021.7.2 depends on package: py38-cloudpickle>=1.5.0 - not found
*** Error code 1
